title: 'I was hit with duce ball': After Abhishek, TMC MP Kalyan Banerjee attacked in Hooghly
content: TMC leader Kalyan Banerjee alleged he was attacked by BJP workers near Chanditala Police Station in West Bengal's Hooghly district while submitting a deputation on post-poll violence. Banerjee claimed he was hit on the head with a stone and accused the police of inaction, calling it an attempt to murder.

title: How Middle East conflict is rewriting your kitchen math — Explained in 10 charts
content: Geopolitical tensions in the Middle East are directly impacting household budgets, driving up prices for everyday essentials like cooking oil, milk, and bread. Soaring global crude oil prices and a weakening rupee are increasing import, fuel, and transportation costs, leading to a domino effect on consumer goods and even healthcare services.

title: With assets worth Rs 1,413 crore, DK Shivakumar set to become India's richest CM
content: Karnataka's D K Shivakumar has become the wealthiest chief minister in India, with declared assets totaling Rs 1,413 crore. His wealth has significantly increased since 2008, largely due to inherited land and property appreciation. Shivakumar's assets include substantial immovable and movable properties, with liabilities of Rs 265 crore.

title: Rajat Patidar: The injury replacement turned captain who changed the fate of RCB
content: Soft-spoken away from the spotlight and measured in his demeanour, Rajat Patidar never fit the image of a franchise-defining superstar. Yet the injury replacement who once went unsold at auction became the captain who delivered RCB's maiden IPL title. Now, after another evolution in his leadership and batting, Patidar stands one victory away from achieving what only Rohit Sharma and MS Dhoni have managed.

title: As ACs run nonstop in 45°C heat, are Delhi homes facing a growing fire hazard?
content: Delhi-NCR's sweltering heat is pushing ACs to their limits, sparking a rise in dangerous fires. Faulty wiring, overloaded circuits, and poor maintenance are increasingly causing AC-related blazes, with recent fatal incidents highlighting the urgent need for awareness. Experts warn that ignoring early warning signs like burning smells or flickering lights can have devastating consequences.

title: Nvidia CEO leaves a 'timeless note' outside bathroom wall in Taiwan's capital
content: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's reputation as a street-food influencer grew with a playful bathroom wall note at Taipei's Raohe Street Night Market.  His global culinary trail, from Vietnam to the U.S., highlights his enduring connection to local food scenes.  Meanwhile, Huang also addressed AI's impact on jobs, dismissing the notion of widespread layoffs as a 'lazy' narrative.

title: 4 dead in south Delhi building collapse
content: A four-storey building collapsed near Saket Metro Station in south Delhi, killing at least four people and injuring several others. Rescue operations are underway with fears that five to six more individuals may be trapped under the debris. The building, reportedly undergoing additional construction, collapsed onto an adjacent canteen.

title: Gunfire in Himachal's Kasol: Tourist shoots local youth after argument, video goes viral
content: Four tourists from Punjab were arrested and a fifth is being sought after a local youth was shot in the leg during a violent altercation in Kasol. The incident, which occurred Saturday evening, involved a dispute escalating into a physical fight where a pistol was allegedly fired. The injured youth is out of danger, and legal proceedings have begun.

title: From heatwave precautions to community service: PM Modi's top quotes from Mann Ki Baat
content: Prime Minister Modi's Mann Ki Baat highlighted inspiring social service, water conservation, and sports achievements. He celebrated India's mango heritage, urged heatwave precautions, and lauded traditional summer drinks reflecting cultural diversity. The address emphasized citizen participation and recognizing ordinary Indians making extraordinary contributions to nation-building.

title: 'Amazon would collapse if run like New York City': Jeff Bezos takes swipe at Mamdani
content: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos has endorsed New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani's new government efficiency initiative, COGE. This comes after their public disagreement on taxing the wealthy. Bezos, who previously criticized city spending, now supports Mamdani's plan to make government work smarter, suggesting savings could benefit lower earners.

title: Israel captures strategic Lebanon castle in deepest incursion in 26 years
content: Israeli troops have captured the strategic Beaufort Castle in southern Lebanon, marking their deepest incursion in over 26 years. This territorial gain occurred despite an existing ceasefire, with forces advancing near Nabatiyeh to dismantle Hezbollah infrastructure. The operation aims to eliminate perceived threats to Israeli civilians.

title: Who is Rounak Adhikary? The entrepreneur living every startup founder's dream
content: Dismissed by Ashneer Grover with a curt 'Tu baith jaa yaar' four years ago, Rounak Adhikary's startup, ProjectX, has now been accepted into the prestigious Y Combinator accelerator. Overcoming over 200 rejections and personal bankruptcy, Adhikary's journey, shaped by childhood bullying and a slow computer, highlights resilience and unwavering conviction in pursuing ambitious dreams against all odds.

title: 'I'm worried about ... ': De Villiers' big concern for RCB ahead of IPL final vs GT
content: Despite Royal Challengers Bengaluru's dominant Qualifier 1 win, former star AB de Villiers expressed concern over Gujarat Titans' formidable bowling attack heading into the IPL 2026 final. Both teams are chasing their second IPL crown, with RCB aiming to defend their title and GT seeking to add to their 2022 victory.

title: AMD CEO shares advice from an IBM exec that convinced her to join a struggling firm
content: AMD CEO Lisa Su credits a pivotal piece of advice from her IBM days – 'run toward problems' – for shaping her leadership. This encouragement to tackle the toughest challenges profoundly influenced her career, including her bold decision to join AMD when the chipmaker was facing significant hurdles.

title: Watch: Russia's 'fire-and-forget' $500 Yolka drone hunter that fits in soldier's hand
content: New footage shows Russian forces deploying the "Yolka" interceptor drone system in combat, a low-cost weapon designed to counter enemy reconnaissance and FPV drones. This handheld system launches a drone that autonomously tracks and engages targets via kinetic impact, offering a portable and cost-effective solution against battlefield UAVs.

title: Ajith Kumar’s massive net worth, luxury car collection
content: Tamil cinema star Ajith Kumar, known for his racing passion and simple lifestyle, recently marked his comeback with 'Good Bad Ugly'. Born in Secunderabad, his journey began far from films, involving mechanics and motor racing. Despite a net worth of Rs 350 crore and luxury assets, he maintains a grounded persona.

title: 'I saw the threat call': Mamata claims police forced doctors to release Abhishek
content: Trinamool MP Abhishek Banerjee was assaulted and abused by protesters in Sonarpur while visiting the home of a party worker allegedly killed in post-poll violence. Chased, pelted with objects, and his shirt torn, Banerjee blamed BJP workers for a planned attack. He plans to approach higher courts, while the BJP denied involvement and highlighted TMC's past actions against their workers.

title: Minecraft Chaos Cubed update release date, features and more details
content: Mojang has officially announced Minecraft's Chaos Cubed update, set for release on June 16, 2026. This highly anticipated update introduces the new Sulfur Caves biome with unique blocks like Sulfur and Cinnabar, potent sulfur hazards, and the innovative Sulfur Cube mob. Java Edition players will also finally receive a Friends List feature.

title: Two brothers die in lightning strike while trekking to world’s highest Shiva temple
content: Tragedy struck on the Chandrashila trek route near Tungnath. Two brothers from Lucknow were killed by a lightning strike. Their companions survived the severe weather. Rescue teams worked through difficult terrain to recover the bodies. The incident highlights the dangers of high-altitude trekking during bad weather.

title: How has Virat Kohli fared against Gujarat Titans?
content: Virat Kohli's exceptional record against Gujarat Titans, boasting 503 runs at 71.85, continues to be a focal point as Royal Challengers Bengaluru face GT in the IPL 2026 final. Having already surpassed 600 runs this season, Kohli aims to extend his dominance in this crucial encounter.

title: Watch: Massive meteor explosion rattles houses across northeastern US
content: A meteor exploded over the northeastern United States on Saturday, unleashing a sonic boom equivalent to 300 tons of TNT. The bright daytime fireball, estimated to be about three feet wide, fragmented approximately 40 miles above the ground, startling residents across multiple states and causing buildings to shake.

title: Ajith’s rare family reflections: Fans revisit old interviews & motor racing dream
content: Following his mother Mohini Mani's passing, fans are recalling actor Ajith Kumar's rare public discussions about his family. He revealed his mother's Sindhi heritage and his own initial struggles with Tamil due to his mixed background, even admitting to an accent. Ajith also shared how his parents, despite financial constraints, strongly supported his motor racing passion, fostering his dreams.

title: Delhi delivery executive delivers vibrator, asks woman, ‘Why this? Use me instead’
content: Customers are reporting disturbing encounters with delivery personnel who are revealing knowledge of their private purchases, particularly from quick commerce platforms. Incidents involving sexual wellness products highlight a serious breach of customer privacy, raising questions about company protocols and operational pressures leading to these embarrassing and frightening situations.

title: Indian-origin Disney manager gets 2.5-year jail term in Russia over drug case
content: An Indian-origin Disney executive, Jugal Daterao, has received a two-and-a-half-year prison sentence in Russia for drug possession and smuggling.  Authorities found THC-infused gummy candies in his luggage at a Moscow airport. Daterao claimed the gummies were legally prescribed in the US for post-brain surgery effects, but the court rejected his defense.

title: Bengaluru Police issue strict advisory ahead of RCB vs GT IPL 2026 final
content: Bengaluru Police have issued a stern advisory for the IPL 2026 final, urging fans to celebrate responsibly. Public gatherings, unauthorised LED screens, live screenings outside venues, firecrackers, bike rallies, and public intoxication are prohibited. Authorities emphasise cooperation to ensure safety and prevent disorder.

title: Video: Mamata loses her cool at hospital authorities with Abhishek on stretcher
content: A video shows Mamata Banerjee confronting hospital officials in Kolkata, reportedly over her nephew Abhishek Banerjee's treatment after an alleged attack. BJP leaders criticized Banerjee, accusing her of pressuring the hospital despite reports of no major injuries. The incident follows an alleged stone-pelting attack on Abhishek Banerjee during a visit.

title: Ghaziabad 'Bakrid invite' murder: Main accused Asad shot dead in encounter
content: Ghaziabad police have shot dead Asad, the main accused in the fatal stabbing of Class 11 student Surya Chauhan. Asad, who was on the run with a Rs 50,000 bounty, allegedly opened fire on police during an attempt to apprehend him. He succumbed to injuries at the hospital. An injured constable is also undergoing treatment.

title: IPL Final: Kohli vs Siraj, Gill vs Bhuvneshwar - Five key player battles
content: Royal Challengers Bengaluru and Gujarat Titans clash in the IPL 2026 final. Key individual battles, including Sai Sudharsan vs. Jacob Duffy and Shubman Gill vs. Bhuvneshwar Kumar, are poised to significantly influence the outcome of this high-stakes championship match.

title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding: Which 3 guests are off the list?
content: Taylor Swift's wedding guest list reportedly excludes former friend Karlie Kloss due to her association with Scooter Braun.  Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds are also said to be on the 'no-no' list. Swift is prioritizing guests who have played significant roles in her life, reflecting her desire for lasting connections.

title: Quote of the day by Idris Elba
content: From the gritty neighborhoods of East London to the dazzling film sets of Hollywood, Idris Elba's story is a powerful testament to conquering the fear of failure. By investing his own resources into moving to the United States, he faced struggles that tested his resolve, yet his unwavering belief in his skill propelled him forward.

title: In first address as CDS, Gen NS Raja Subramani vows modernisation and innovation
content: Lt Gen NS Raja Subramani (Retd) assumed charge as India's Chief of Defence Staff, succeeding Gen Anil Chauhan. He pledged to drive military modernization through innovation, collaboration, and greater integration across sectors, emphasizing the welfare of soldiers and national security.

title: Watch: US strikes another vessel in 'narco-trafficking' routes, killing three
content: In a bold move against drug trafficking, US military forces have launched a series of airstrikes on vessels suspected of transporting narcotics in the eastern Pacific, leading to the demise of several individuals involved. This operation underscores a renewed effort to dismantle Latin American drug cartels and halt the relentless influx of illegal drugs into the United States.

title: Mohini Mani's demise: Vijay and Trisha Krishnan reach Ajith Kumar's residence
content: Actor Ajith Kumar returned to Chennai following his mother Mohini Mani's passing at 89.  Several film and political figures, including Vijay and Trisha Krishnan, visited his residence to offer condolences. The family announced Mohini Mani died peacefully in her sleep after declining health and requested privacy for the private final rites.

title: DK Yes: Citing fuel price hike and traffic jams, Shivakumar opts for low-key ceremony
content: D K Shivakumar will be sworn in as Karnataka's 25th Chief Minister on June 3rd at 3:30 pm, following months of political maneuvering and a power tussle with Siddaramaiah. The simple ceremony at Lok Bhavan aims to reflect the party's commitment to public service and avoid inconvenience to citizens.

title: Are human soldiers being replaced? How Ukraine's 'silent death' robots are fighting Russia
content: Ukraine's war against Russia is transforming into a conflict dominated by machines. Robots and drones are now performing dangerous missions, replacing human soldiers on the frontlines. This shift is driven by Ukraine's troop shortages. Unmanned systems are carrying explosives, delivering supplies, and providing reconnaissance. This technological revolution offers a glimpse into the future of combat.

title: 2 restaurant owners in Bengaluru held for selling beef as mutton
content: Bengaluru police arrested two men for allegedly deceiving customers by serving beef disguised as mutton at their restaurant. Investigations confirmed the allegations after plainclothes officers verified complaints. The owners were booked under the Cow Slaughter and Cattle Prevention Act and sent to judicial custody.

title: More muscle, less fat, same deadly swing: How Bhuvneshwar is defying age at 36
content: At 36, Bhuvneshwar Kumar is still outrunning younger pacers. While generations of fast bowlers have come and gone since his IPL debut in 2011, the RCB veteran remains a constant. TOI traces the fitness transformation, meticulous preparation and daily discipline that have helped him stay relevant in cricket's most demanding format for more than a decade.

title: Without water, gas and power, Eid turns into nightmare in Pakistan's Karachi
content: Karachi residents endured a grim Eid-ul-Adha marked by severe water, gas, and power outages. Families struggled to cook and preserve meat amid sweltering heat, leading to widespread protests. Despite official assurances, essential services failed, forcing many to resort to costly alternatives and endure immense hardship during the festival.

title: NFL Trade Rumors: Chiefs eye Bears TE and Giants pass rusher
content: The Kansas City Chiefs have been linked to two potential trade targets in ESPN's offseason simulation. One proposal would bring Chicago Bears tight end Cole Kmet to Kansas City for a 2027 third-round pick, while another would send New York Giants edge rusher Kayvon Thibodeaux to the Chiefs for a 2027 fourth-rounder. The rumors address Kansas City's needs at tight end depth behind Travis Kelce and pass-rush help entering the 2026 season.

title: 'Drishyam 3' BO day 10: Mohanlal film sees weekend rise
content: Mohanlal's latest mystery drama is experiencing a robust second weekend, with collections seeing a significant jump on Saturday. The film has now surpassed Rs 91 crore in India net collections and a remarkable Rs 219 crore globally, driven by strong performances in Kerala and overseas markets. This success positions it for further box office milestones.

title: Titans take on champions: Shubman Gill, Rajat Patidar chase legacy as GT and RCB eye 2nd IPL crown
content: Defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru face Gujarat Titans in a thrilling IPL 2026 final. Both teams boast in-form captains, Rajat Patidar and Shubman Gill, and formidable batting line-ups. The contest promises a compelling clash of consistent teams, with RCB aiming for a second consecutive title and GT seeking to leverage home advantage.

title: 'Offered to fly Abhishek to Hyderabad': Mamata on how Rahul reached out to help
content: TMC supremo Mamata Banerjee revealed that Rahul Gandhi offered assistance for Abhishek Banerjee's medical treatment following an alleged attack in West Bengal. Gandhi condemned the incident as an assault on democracy, while the TMC blamed BJP-backed supporters, a claim the BJP denies.

title: The titans of Gujarat: Shubman Gill and Sai Sudharsan
content: Shubman Gill and Sai Sudharsan have transformed Gujarat Titans into a batting powerhouse, combining consistency, class and record-breaking partnerships. With eight century stands and nearly 3,000 runs together, the opening pair has emerged as one of T20 cricket's greatest duos, giving GT a formidable edge ahead of the IPL final against Royal Challengers Bengaluru.

title: WhatsApp, training and tenecteplase injection bring heart attack care to rural Punjab
content: By combining WhatsApp-based coordination, training for frontline healthcare workers, and the clot-busting injection tenecteplase, doctors are improving access to timely heart attack care in rural Punjab

title: Mallikarjun Kharge meets Telangana leaders during Hyderabad stopover
content: The meeting assumes significance in the backdrop of rumours that Mr. Goud is pushing for a Cabinet berth in the next expansion

title: IAS officers reshuffle in Tamil Nadu: Five new Collectors, three Corporation Commissioners appointed
content: New Collectors posted in Perambalur, Ariyalur, Chennai, Tiruvallur and Ramanathapuram districts. Coimbatore, Tiruchi and Madurai get new Corporation Commissioners.

title: Manoj Bajpayee, Huma Qureshi, Kritika Kamra to headline Hindu Huddle sessions in Bengaluru
content: Actors will discuss their journeys, roles, evolving craft, and changing landscape of Indian entertainment

title: Candid conversations on Kashmir expected at The Hindu Huddle
content: J&K CM Omar Abdullah will be engaged in candid dialogue with Dr. Narayan Lakshman, Opinion Editor, The Hindu, and Curator, The Hindu Huddle, in a session titled ‘Beyond the Valley: The role of Kashmir in great power politics’ on June 5

title: Revanth Reddy to embark on multi-district tour, launch key development projects across Telangana from June 1
content: The five-day tour is expected to provide fresh momentum to several flagship programmes and infrastructure projects

title: TMC MP Kalyan Banerjee claims BJP supporters attacked, injured him outside police station
content: Tension prevailed outside the Chanditala police station as a group of people waved black flags at Kalyan Banerjee, the MP from Hoogly district's Sreerampore, and shouted "thief" at him and other TMC delegation

title: BJP will form the government again in 2027 under Dhami’s leadership in Uttarakhand: Nitin Nabin
content: Speaking at a gathering in Dehradun, Nabin highlighted the Dhami government’s impactful initiatives, including the implementation of the Uniform Civil Code and successful management of the Char Dham Yatra.

title: Mann Ki Baat: PM Modi urges people to take precautions amid scorching heat
content: In his monthly radio broadcast Mann Ki Baat, he said people should take extra precautions when stepping out in the sun

title: Power Minister pushes for timely settlement of West Bengal State-depts’ dues, shift to prepaid metering
content: The West Bengal government committed to saturate smart meters across government establishments by June this year, and transitioning to prepaid by August

title: Chamba accident: Operation under way to retrieve bodies from gorge
content: The accident occurred when the car was going towards the snow-bound Sach Pass, one of the toughest stretches in Himachal Pradesh, the officials said

title: Watch: Mamata slams ‘barbaric’ attack on Abhishek Banerjee, says TMC won’t be intimidated
content: Trinamool Congress chief Mamata Banerjee has strongly condemned the attack on Abhishek Banerjee during his visit to a violence-hit party worker’s family in Sonarpur.

title: BJP alleges Mamata pressured private hospital to admit Abhishek Banerjee
content: Making the allegation in an X post, West Bengal BJP spokesperson Debjit Sarkar shared an audio clip in which Mamata Banerjee was purportedly heard expressing anger over the hospital's reluctance to admit the Diamond Harbour MP

title: Five arrested for attack on Abhishek, Mamata says police pressurised hospitals not to admit him
content: After a mob attacked him at Sonarpur, the Trinamool Congress general secretary was taken to two private hospitals in Kolkata and both the institutions refused admission to him on grounds that the injuries were not serious in nature.

title: DSC-2025 conducted with transparency and fairness, says  Education Secretary
content: The allegations surrounding the Mega DSC-2025 are baseless, politically motivated and intended to mislead candidates, says Kona Sasidhar

title: West Asia conflict to impact SAIL steel prices marginally: Official
content: The company buys raw materials, such as limestone from Dubai, Ashok Panda, the newly appointed Chairman of SAIL, said

title: Gruha Lakshmi scheme: Inform authorities of beneficiaries’ death to transfer benefits to next eligible woman in family
content: Chairman of Chamarajanagar District Guarantee Schemes Implementation Authority directed officials to promptly process applications submitted by new beneficiaries under the Gruha Lakshmi Scheme

title: Vizianagaram Collector orders speedy completion of Jaladhara Jalaharathi works
content: S. Ramsundar Reddy says 5,000 desilting works have been taken up in the first phase and 12,305 identified across the district

title: Para-athlete held for shooting dead national-level para-athlete Chirag Tyagi in Ghaziabad
content: During the investigation, police detained one Yash Khatik, who is also a para-athlete and had previously trained with Tyagi

title: Yoga sessions to be held across 120 locations in Mysuru on June 21
content: As the coming Yoga Day was the 12th Yoga day, the Mysuru Yoga Federation had planned to mark the occasion by holding yoga sessions at 120 venues

title: The Sulur horror story of child sexual assault and murder
content: The shocking sexual assault and murder of a 10-year-old girl near Sulur in Coimbatore comes as a reminder that constant vigilance and creating a safe society for women and girls should be among the top priorities for the new government in Tamil Nadu

title: Prevalence of diabetes continues to climb in southern States: NFHS
content: Andhra Pradesh, Kerala, and Tamil Nadu emerge as hotspots for overweight and obese adults, the National Family Health Survey-6 shows

title: Y. Balaji Kiran takes additional charge as Chief PRO of South Coast Railway
content: The 2013-batch Indian Railway Traffic Service officer, who serves as Deputy General Manager-cum-Secretary to the SCoR General Manager since November 2025, holds the additional post

title: 'Ugly face of BJP's politics of revenge': Opposition leaders condemn attack on TMC's Abhishek
content: Stones, eggs and abuses were hurled at the Diamond Harbour MP when he visited Sonarpur town on the outskirts of Kolkata to meet the family of a TMC worker who was allegedly killed in post-poll violence

title: Delhi High Court’s pathbreaking ruling on Google keyword advertising | Explained
content: Justice Mini Pushkarna assessed if a company can buy another’s registered trademark as a keyword on Google Ads to have their ads appear first in searches for that trademark

title: Onion farmers seek ₹10,000 crore revival package, stable export policy from Centre
content: Bharat Dighole, founder-president of the Maharashtra State Onion Growers Farmers Association, said that farmers have suffered huge losses over the years due to what he termed flawed export policies, spurious seeds, storage losses and other factors

title: Murder of student in Ghaziabad: Main accused killed following encounter with police
content: Asad, a resident of the Khoda area, was wanted in connection with the stabbing of Surya Chauhan, who succumbed to his injuries while undergoing treatment and was later pronounced dead

title: Navy stands vigilant to protect national interests, says new chief Admiral Krishna Swaminathan
content: Admiral Swaminathan said the Indian Navy is well set on a course of capability enhancement and modernisation

title: General Subramani takes charge as new Chief of Defence Staff
content: Gen. N.S. Raja Subramani was serving as the Military Advisor at the National Security Council Secretariat and he retired as the Vice Chief of Army Staff on July 31 last year

title: It was never a fair fight, but I am proud of myself: Vinesh after Asian Games selection trials defeat
content: The rancour between the federation and Vinesh had already given enough indications of an uneasy truce, mediated by the judiciary.

title: Three killed, seven hurt as APSRTC bus hits stationary lorry at Gajuwaka in Visakhapatnam
content: A super-luxury bus from Rajahmundry to Parvathipuram, carrying about 35 passengers, hit a coal-laden lorry parked on the roadside at Sri Nagar Junction in the early hours of Sunday

title: Uproar in U.P. over 10% fuel surcharge on electricity bills
content: The “fuel and power purchase adjustment surcharge”, to be calculated effective from March, will be charged in June. The Congress and the SP dub the decision as the failure of the BJP government in the State and flag issues such as frequent power cuts

title: Pre-monsoon showers drench Mumbai, waterlogging slows traffic in some areas
content: Several parts of Mumbai, including the island city, western suburbs and eastern suburbs, received moderate to heavy rainfall, with waterlogging reported in some areas

title: Second-life surgery | Surrendered Maoists in Maharashtra reverse vasectomies for family life
content: As men in Maharashtra’s Maoist-affected Gadchiroli district give up arms, their outlook on life has changed. This report discusses how they are reversing the vasectomies that a life of resistance in the forest had forced them into

title: News in Frames | Bringing water to a scorching desert
content: The Indira Gandhi Canal serves as a critical water supply resource for Jaisalmer and thousands of remote desert villages; yet scarcity persists, with many still relying on ancestral wells as concerns over groundwater depletion and canal maintenance remain

title: D.K. Shivakumar | ‘Rock’ of Congress
content: The party’s crisis manager, known for his organisational skills and grassroots networks, is set to become Karnataka’s Chief Minister

title: Mob attacks Trinamool leader Abhishek Banerjee; Mamata blames it on BJP
content: Police and Central security personnel escort the Trinamool general secretary out of Sonarpur, where locals had surrounded him

title: Bengaluru traffic constable’s act of kindness amid flooded road wins hearts online in viral video
content: The video shows a traffic constable, identified as Anil of the Byatarayanapura Traffic Police Station, dressed in an orange raincoat, trying to help a physically challenged person cross the road

title: Kochi sailor who endured Equatorial Guinea’s detention feels relieved with international tribunal’s verdict
content: Kochi-based sailor Sanu Jose was the chief officer of Heroic Idun when the vessel was detained by Equatorial Guinea on charge of violating their territorial waters and attempt to steal crude oil

title: Oppn. accuses Kochi Mayor of ‘abuse of power’ over extension of biomining agreement
content: LDF alleges that the contract with the company engaged in biomining legacy waste was renewed after its expiry without the council’s approval

title: Kochi Corpn. to seek explanation from LED streetlight contractor
content: The Mayor announces the decision at the council meeting after councillors level severe criticism against the contractor and accuse him of indifference that exposes them to public ire

title: Pune hooch deaths rise to 22; several officials suspended
content: The 22 suspended officials include three officers from the Pune police force, six from the Pimpri Chinchwad police force, and thirteen from the state excise department.

title: Malls, e-commerce hit school accessories market hard
content: Retailers say prices have risen only marginally this year, blaming weak sales on cautious consumer spending and a shift towards e-commerce

title: Bihar government suspends two IAS officers over corruption charges
content: According to Special Vigilance Unit (SVU) sources, a contractor named Rishu Shree sponsored foreign trips and bore the expenses of air travel for the IAS officers in exchange for securing contracts.

title: Building collapses near Saket metro station; 8 persons rescued, several feared trapped
content: The building fell on an adjacent tin-shed canteen where a few children were having dinner. They are also feared to be trapped under the debris

title: DMK holds meeting to mobilise ‘Gen Z’
content: Referring to discussions on the local body elections due in the State, N.R. Elango said Tamil Nadu could even witness another Assembly election.

title: From collapse to comeback: Tungabhadra dam in Karnataka gets new lease of life
content: Nearly two years after Gate No. 19 was washed away, the historic reservoir stands renewed with all 33 crest gates replaced; it is set to be inaugurated by month-end

title: "You Did Wrong": Mamata Banerjee Heard Scolding Hospital CEO, BJP Shares Video
content: A state BJP leader has shared a clip in which Banerjee was allegedly heard yelling at Pradeep Tandon, CEO of the Belle Vue Hospital in Kolkata.

title: Himanta Sarma To Expand Cabinet On June 5, 9 MLAs Likely To Be Inducted
content: The BJP-led National Democratic Alliance (NDA) returned to power for a third consecutive term in the state, winning 102 out of 126 seats in the April 9 elections

title: 5 Arrested For Attack On Trinamool Leader Abhishek Banerjee In Bengal
content: Banerjee was attacked when he went to visit the victims of post-poll violence, and later claimed that BJP activists were trying to kill him. Unidentified people scuffled with the leader and roughed him up while raising chants of "thief, thief".

title: 1 Dead, 8 Rescued After 3-Storey Building Collapses In South Delhi
content: Officials said the building was completely reduced to rubble, with debris crashing onto an adjoining tin shed canteen frequented by students preparing for medical entrance examinations.

title: Fight, Gunshots, Panic: Punjab Tourist Injures Local In Kasol Firing
content: An argument between two groups over an unspecified issue quickly escalated into a physical fight, during which gunshots were allegedly fired.

title: UP Para-Athlete Shot Dead Days After Qualifying For Asian Games, Friend Arrested
content: Chirag Tyagi was counted among the nation's most promising emerging para-athletes who had recently won a gold medal in the 400-meter race at the National Para Athletics Championship held in Bengaluru.

title: Ghaziabad Man Who Stabbed Friend After Bakrid Invite Killed In Encounter
content: The development comes days after 17-year-old Surya Pratap Chauhan was allegedly stabbed by Asad and his accomplices in Ghaziabad on May 28, the day of Bakrid.

title: "Let Them Evict Me By Force, I Won't Vacate": Rabri Devi On Bihar Residence
content: Rabri Devi, who is the leader of the opposition in the legislative council, was first asked by the government to move out in November last year when Nitish Kumar was still the chief minister.

title: For The Banerjees, Who Ruled Bengal For 15 Years, A Fall From Grace
content: Abhishek Banerjee was visiting the family of party workers affected by post-poll violence when a crowd charged at him with 'chor, chor' slogans.

title: A Quiet Lifestyle Shift In Urban India Is Powering A $12 Billion Market
content: Organised sector accounts for just 15-20% of the interior design, home decor market. The remaining 80-85% still belongs to the fragmented ecosystem.

title: Who Is Lieutenant General NS Raja Subramani, India's New Chief Of Defence Staff
content: Gen NS Raja Subramani succeeded Gen Anil Chauhan, who signed off after completing his tenure as the country's senior-most military commander on Saturday.

title: 'Injuries Were Superficial': Hospital On Not Admitting Abhishek Banerjee
content: Banerjee was taken to a private hospital after complaining of pain in his neck, back and waist following an attack during his visit to Sonarpur in South 24 Parganas, an official of the medical facility said.

title: 'Chor, Chor To Eggs, Stones: How Attack On Abhishek Banerjee Unfolded
content: Abhishek Banerjee claimed to have inside information about the alleged outsiders involved in the attack, claiming that they had been mobilised through a Facebook live session before his arrival in Sonarpur.

title: US Struck Commercial Ship Trying To Breach Blockade 'After 20 Warnings', Reach Iran
content: The Gambia-flagged cargo ship Lian Star ignored more than 20 warnings from US forces overnight as it tried to enter an Iranian port.

title: US Says Capable Of Resuming War With Iran As Deal Remains Elusive
content: The United States warned on Saturday it was "more than capable" of resuming its war with Iran after President Donald Trump said any peace deal must adhere to his red lines, including Tehran...

title: VD Satheesan Revokes Principal's Suspension Over Online Post Targeting Him
content: S Javad, Principal of the Government Model Boys' Higher Secondary School, Attingal, was suspended on Friday following allegations that he had posted insulting content against the chief minister on social media.

title: Sue Tilley Met Lucian Freud In 1990s. Her Nude Painting Could Now Fetch $47 Million
content: Lucian Freud, a grandson of psychoanalyst Sigmund Freud, is famed for fleshy nudes of friends, family and the artist himself.

title: From Sidda to DKS: Congress hopes Karnataka change of guard will blunt anti-incumbency, fill gaps
content: the transition from siddaramaiah to Shivakumar is rooted in the informal arrangement that was made at the time of the selection of CM following a keen tussle between the two for the top post . sources said the transition comes at the right time to start with a clean slate to blunt the anti-incumbency that sets-in in the state for every govt .

title: End of an era for Air India colonies in Mumbai’s Kalina as last of the occupants leave
content: the first staff colony was followed by three more through the 198th century . the colony is the first of the four constructed way back in 1955 . on Sunday, the last of the occupants will leave, and Mumbai International Airport Ltd will take possession of the land leased to it two decades ago .
